error_signature: The value in 'iVBORw...kSuQmCC' is not set
title: Base64 Input Field not set correctly in Convert to File node
symptom: The Convert to File node throws an error indicating that the base64 value is not set, despite the input being valid.
not_this_if: Using a different node for conversion
root_cause: The Convert to File node requires the Base64 Input Field to be specified as a fixed string representing the field name, rather than an expression that references the base64 text value. This misconfiguration leads to the error message.
fix_steps: Open the Convert to File node settings
Set the Base64 Input Field to the fixed string 'data'
agent_instruction: Set the Base64 Input Field in the Convert to File node to 'data' and save the workflow.
